CASE STUDY

Aura Salon & Spa

Developing a luxury appointment booking solution integrated with service category maps and automated client WhatsApp alerts.

Industry Beauty & Wellness
Technologies HTML5, CSS3, Calendar API
Client Aura Wellness Group Ltd.
Completed March 2026
Visit Live Site View Source Code

The Problem

Aura Salon & Spa depended heavily on manual calendar entries and voice call reservations. During peak periods, telephone lines became congested, resulting in a 25% drop in bookings. Additionally, they had zero keyword positioning for high-value search terms like "hair spa near me" due to lack of local optimization structure.

Our Solution

We delivered an intuitive, mobile-first web app with custom styling matching their high-end service levels. We structured:

  • Calendar Engine: A lightweight calendar module displaying available time blocks, therapists, and package options.
  • Local SEO Architecture: Integrated detailed LocalBusiness JSON-LD markup with geolocation tokens to rank high on regional searches.
  • WhatsApp Notification Bridge: Automatic generation of booking alerts sent to clients' mobile devices for schedule validation.

The Results

+65% Total Online Bookings
+30% Average Ticket Order
Top 3 Local Map-Pack Position

WebAura builds state-of-the-art web products optimized for speed, aesthetics, and high-impact business growth.
